  'headline': '3 Small-Cap Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Investors looking for hidden gems should keep an eye on '

 {'date': '2026-03-09 19:59:16',
  'headline': '3 Russell 2000 Stocks with Warning Signs',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'The Russell 2000 (^RUT) is packed with potential breakout '
             'stocks, thanks to its focus on smaller companies with high '
             'growth potential. However, smaller size also means these '
             'businesses often lack the resilience and financial flexibility '
             'of large-cap firms, making careful selection crucial.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/3-russell-2000-stocks-warning-195916306.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-05 15:56:53',
  'headline': '3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks We Steer Clear Of',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention '
             'in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/3-wall-street-favorite-stocks-155653452.html'},
